productDisplayName: Timex Men Black Dial Watch J201
description: Article number: J201Case style: Analogue watch with a circular case, fixed, textured bezel and a stainless steel backDial style: Black, textured dial, has steel toned hour and minute hands with glow-in-the-dark inlay, steel toned and red seconds hand, steel toned markings, branding on the dialFeatures: Screw to reset the time, day aperture above the 6 hour mark, date aperture on the 9 hour markStrap style: Black, textured, leather strap secured with a tang claspWater resistantComes in a signature Timex caseWarranty: 1 year against manufacturing defects
